---
title: "BEDC Operation Space-Time"
description: "Interactive Rule 110 space-time diagrams for concrete BEDC operations."
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
---

<style>
#title-block-header {
  display: none;
}
#quarto-content,
#quarto-document-content {
  padding-bottom: 0;
}
#quarto-content {
  height: calc(100vh - 62px);
  max-height: calc(100vh - 62px);
  overflow: hidden;
}
#quarto-document-content {
  margin-bottom: 0;
  margin-top: 0;
  padding-top: 0;
}
.bedc-fullscreen {
  background: #f7f5ef;
  box-sizing: border-box;
  display: grid;
  gap: 0.6rem;
  grid-template-rows: auto auto minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
  max-height: calc(100vh - 62px);
  min-height: calc(100vh - 62px);
  padding: 0.8rem 1.2rem;
}
.bedc-header {
  min-width: 0;
}
.bedc-space-kicker {
  color: #6d675b;
  font-size: 0.68rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  line-height: 1;
  margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}
.bedc-space-title {
  color: #1f1f1d;
  font-size: 1.35rem;
  line-height: 1.15;
  margin: 0;
}
.bedc-space-lede {
  color: #3f3d38;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  line-height: 1.35;
  margin: 0.25rem 0 0;
  max-width: 980px;
}
.bedc-controls {
  align-items: end;
  display: grid;
  gap: 0.7rem;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(260px, 1.5fr) minmax(84px, auto) minmax(220px, 1fr) minmax(170px, 0.7fr);
}
.bedc-control {
  display: grid;
  gap: 0.25rem;
  min-width: 0;
}
.bedc-control label,
.bedc-step-readout {
  color: #4d4942;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 700;
}
.bedc-control select,
.bedc-control input[type="range"],
.bedc-play-button {
  width: 100%;
}
.bedc-control select {
  background: #fffdf8;
  border: 1px solid #c9c2b3;
  border-radius: 6px;
  color: #222;
  font: inherit;
  min-height: 2.2rem;
  padding: 0.3rem 0.55rem;
}
.bedc-play-button {
  background: #222;
  border: 1px solid #222;
  border-radius: 6px;
  color: #fff;
  cursor: pointer;
  font: inherit;
  min-height: 2.2rem;
  padding: 0 0.85rem;
}
.bedc-canvas-area {
  align-items: center;
  background: #fffdf8;
  border: 1px solid #c9c2b3;
  border-radius: 6px;
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  min-height: 0;
  overflow: auto;
}
.bedc-canvas-area canvas {
  display: block;
  image-rendering: pixelated;
  max-height: 100%;
  max-width: 100%;
}
.bedc-meta-row {
  align-items: center;
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.5rem 0.65rem;
  min-height: 4.8rem;
}
.bedc-meta-card {
  background: #fffdf8;
  border: 1px solid #d8d0c0;
  border-radius: 4px;
  display: grid;
  gap: 0.12rem;
  max-width: 28rem;
  min-width: 6.5rem;
  padding: 0.3rem 0.55rem;
}
.bedc-meta-card span {
  color: #6d675b;
  font-size: 0.66rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  line-height: 1.1;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}
.bedc-meta-card code {
  color: #222;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  line-height: 1.25;
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
  white-space: normal;
}
.bedc-legend-inline {
  align-items: center;
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.35rem 0.55rem;
}
.bedc-legend-item {
  align-items: center;
  color: #3f3d38;
  display: inline-flex;
  font-size: 0.74rem;
  gap: 0.25rem;
  line-height: 1.2;
}
.bedc-legend-swatch {
  border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
  display: inline-block;
  flex: 0 0 auto;
  height: 0.66rem;
  width: 0.66rem;
}
@media (max-width: 900px) {
  .bedc-controls {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 7rem;
  }
  .bedc-control:first-child,
  .bedc-control:nth-child(3),
  .bedc-control:nth-child(4) {
    grid-column: 1 / -1;
  }
}
@media (max-width: 760px) {
  #quarto-content {
    height: auto;
    max-height: none;
    overflow: visible;
  }
  .bedc-fullscreen {
    max-height: none;
    min-height: auto;
  }
  .bedc-controls {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
  .bedc-control:first-child,
  .bedc-control:nth-child(3),
  .bedc-control:nth-child(4) {
    grid-column: auto;
  }
}
</style>

```{=html}
<div id="bedc-spacetime-app" class="bedc-fullscreen">
  <header class="bedc-header">
    <div class="bedc-space-kicker">Rule 110 substrate</div>
    <h2 class="bedc-space-title">BEDC operations as executable space-time diagrams</h2>
    <p class="bedc-space-lede">Concrete BEDC manifest cases are loaded into the Rule 110 substrate, evolved in the browser, and annotated with payload, decode, and boundary regions.</p>
  </header>

  <div class="bedc-controls" aria-label="BEDC Rule 110 controls">
    <div class="bedc-control">
      <label for="bedc-operation-select">Operation</label>
      <select id="bedc-operation-select"></select>
    </div>
    <div class="bedc-control">
      <label>&nbsp;</label>
      <button id="bedc-play-toggle" class="bedc-play-button" type="button">Play</button>
    </div>
    <div class="bedc-control">
      <label for="bedc-step-scrubber">Step <span id="bedc-step-label" class="bedc-step-readout">0 / 0</span></label>
      <input id="bedc-step-scrubber" type="range" min="0" max="0" step="1" value="0">
    </div>
    <div class="bedc-control">
      <label for="bedc-speed-slider">Speed <span id="bedc-speed-label" class="bedc-step-readout">12 fps</span></label>
      <input id="bedc-speed-slider" type="range" min="1" max="30" step="1" value="12">
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="bedc-canvas-area">
    <canvas id="bedc-spacetime-canvas" width="960" height="420" aria-label="Rule 110 space-time diagram"></canvas>
  </div>

  <div class="bedc-meta-row" aria-label="BEDC operation metadata">
    <div id="bedc-operation-meta" class="bedc-legend-inline"></div>
    <div id="bedc-layer-legend" class="bedc-legend-inline"></div>
  </div>
</div>
<script src="assets/rule110_evolve.js"></script>
<script src="assets/bedc_spacetime.js"></script>
```
